text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer, you're looking rather exhausted.
Oh dear, that won't do. I know just the thing...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Let's get dancing! Come on, now! Give me
dynamic! Open up those joints!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Faster, faster—raise the beat! Well? I
bet that raised your heartbeat too, didn't it?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Being tired is no excuse to do nothing—no, no.
Feeling sluggish? Dance. Anxious? Take the dive.
Remember that!
